summary: Zinderman sends what records suggest is FDA's final weekly COVID-19 vaccine data mining report.
body: Zinderman sends a weekly data mining report to his colleagues at FDA, including Menschik and Nair, and to a limited number of senior CDC officials, including Tom Shimabukuro and John Su.[^fn-220] Based on records reviewed by the Subcommittee, this appears to be the final weekly data mining report FDA distributes for the COVID-19 vaccines.
